title: Fix Grid Levels, Open Orders, and Trade History showing empty data

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the Grid Preview Table (grid levels) panel so that it correctly fetches and displays current grid price levels from the backend canister. Ensure loading, error, and empty states are handled distinctly — empty state should only appear if the backend genuinely returns zero grid levels, not due to a fetch failure or uninitialized actor.
acceptanceCriteria: Grid levels panel shows real buy/sell price levels when the bot has an active grid configured
A loading skeleton is shown while data is being fetched
An error message is displayed if the fetch fails, rather than an empty list
Backend query for grid levels returns structured data including price levels, not an empty array, when grid is active

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the Open Orders panel so that it correctly fetches and displays open orders from the backend canister. Ensure the panel distinguishes between a genuine empty order book and a failed/unresolved query — errors must surface visibly rather than silently rendering an empty list.
acceptanceCriteria: Open orders panel shows all currently placed buy and sell orders when orders exist on the canister
A loading skeleton is shown while data is being fetched
An error message is displayed if the fetch fails, rather than an empty list
Backend query for open orders returns the correct list of active orders

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the Trade History panel so that it correctly fetches and displays past trades from the backend canister. Ensure the panel distinguishes between a genuine empty history and a failed/unresolved query — errors must surface visibly rather than silently rendering an empty list.
acceptanceCriteria: Trade history panel shows past trades (filled, cancelled, open) in reverse-chronological order when history exists
A loading skeleton is shown while data is being fetched
An error message is displayed if the fetch fails, rather than an empty list
Backend query for trade history returns actual trade records, not an empty array, when trades have occurred

requirements.text: Audit the useQueries.ts hooks for grid levels, open orders, and trade history to ensure: (1) the actor is fully initialized before queries fire, (2) canister health-check guards are not incorrectly blocking these queries, (3) polling intervals are active, and (4) fetch errors are propagated to the UI rather than swallowed.

quotes: Grid level. Open orders. Trade History. Esses aparecem vazios.

acceptanceCriteria: Queries for grid levels, open orders, and trade history are not gated behind conditions that permanently prevent them from running
Errors from these queries are reflected in the isError state and surfaced to the corresponding panel components
Polling is active for all three queries while the dashboard is open

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing backend state and data structures; do not alter storage variables or break existing functionality
nonGoals: Redesigning the visual layout or theme of any panel
Adding new trading features or bot configuration options
Modifying the Market Data LIVE panel (already fixed in Version 34)
